text:
Self Understood CHAR 1 Indicates the patient's ability to express or communicate requests, needs, opinions, urgent problems, and social conversation, whether in speech, writing, sign language, or a combination of these. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Understood, 1 = Usually Understood - difficulty finding words or finishing thoughts, 2 = Sometimes Understood - ability is limited to making concrete requests, 3 = Rarely/Never Understood
60 E1L E1L_WORRIED_FACE 21(E1l)Sad, Pained, Worried Facial
